strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-compatible systems
Strong background in scalable architecture, CI/CD, and test-driven development practices
Proven ability to integrate diverse systems (CRM, document management, automation tools) in high-traffic environments
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role with significant senior-level experience (10+ years)
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primarily MongoDB and SQLite in listed projects)
No explicit mention of energy/construction domain knowledge or relevant project experience
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates exceptional technical depth and breadth in fullstack development, with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js skills alongside architectural expertise. However, her 10+ years of senior-level experience may not align with the junior/mid-level role requirements, and her lack of domain-specific experience in renewable energy/construction technology is notable despite her impressive background in adjacent domains.
